home.heroTitle: Leading global technology brands, delivered to Mongolia's mining and industrial sector
home.heroSubtitle: We supply original-quality measuring instruments, electrical and mechanical equipment from world-leading brands — Siemens, ABB, Schneider Electric, Yokogawa, Fluke — for both tenders and commercial trade.
home.heroLine1: Some distributors sell what's already in the warehouse.
home.heroLine2: We build what your operation actually needs.
home.heroSubBrands: Siemens · ABB · Schneider Electric · Yokogawa · Fluke — matched to your tier, not your budget line.
home.positioning: The world's best technology. On time. To specification. In Mongolia.
home.positioningSub: For Mongolian industry that cannot afford downtime, MIU is the authorized distribution partner delivering the world's most trusted industrial technology — backed by local engineering, documentation, and accountability that global vendors alone cannot offer.
home.visionCtaTitle: Our vision for Mongolia's industrial future
home.brandShowcaseTitle: Official partner to 8 leading global brands

about.heroTitle: Enriching global technology with Mongolian know-how
about.heroSubtitle: Since 2012, MIU has worked as an official representative of world-leading brands in Mongolia's mining and industrial sector.
about.vision: To create a new wave of modern eco-technology and build a sustainable way of life for the future.
about.mission: We reimagine humanity's technological achievements and discoveries — merging modern progress with the wisdom of traditional life — to offer the world more balanced, eco-rooted solutions.

values.title: Natural science
values.desc: Solving problems in harmony with nature's own rhythm and balance.

values.title: Nomadic heritage
values.desc: Making a simple yet intelligent, adaptable way of life the core idea behind our business.

values.title: Innovative thinking
values.desc: Seeing the old in a new light — the ability to reinvent global technology.

values.title: Sustainable development
values.desc: Building systems that are environmentally friendly and built to last.

values.title: Global openness
values.desc: Sharing our domestic value with the world, enriching global progress with Mongolian know-how.

about.principlesSubtitle: We operate by international standards of business ethics

principles.title: Reliability
principles.desc: Fulfilling commitments, tender terms and deadlines on time, every time.

principles.title: Protecting brand reputation
principles.desc: Respecting the vision, goals and values of our partner brands, acting as a long-term reliable partner in promoting and introducing their products to the domestic market.

principles.title: Fair pricing
principles.desc: Growing value through reliable, sustainable, responsive delivery rather than high margins.

about.strategic: MIU aims to bring in brands that offer leading technology solutions, become their official representative/distributor, and drive market entry across both tender and commercial trade. In working with international brand partners, we hold their reputation, goals and values in high regard, and prioritize long-term, mutually beneficial partnerships.

activities.name: Trade in iron and steel structures
Wholesale trade on a fee or contract basis
Trade in automobile parts and components
